transcript.text:
[Comments: This feels like the show "Hometown Report"]
[Well, if you guys say so..]
[I am on the show now]
It's Tzuyang
Let's go get masu salmon
[Footage from the show "Hometown Report" that aired on February 11th]
[This video was put together for Tzuyang's YouTube channel with footages from KBS1 Hometown Report]
[Parody for the Korean movie "The Thieves"
[Macau Baek] [Baek Seung Il, former Korean wrestler]
[Tzunicall] [Tzuyang, mukbanger]
Let's have a talk Do you know who I am?
Are you Macau Baek?
You've grown up
Your hairstyle changed
Why does that matter for a thief?
Let's just get to it

Let's start
[6 Tons of Masu Salmon stolen]
Let the professionals play the game
I'm ready
Stop
We'll need that hammer soon
[Kwang Ryul Ko] [The owner]
Hey you
Do you know me?
Will that be enough to pay your workers?
What are you guys doing?
Robbing you
Why are you doing this?
I'm sorry
Over here Let's search
This won't take long

Just go..
No
I only got to eat an apple and half a cabbage because I'm on a diet
You're full of crap Bring me the hammer
Here you go
We make our money for the meat It's capitalism
That's embarrassing
Why aren't we starting? Let's get it over with
Are you ready? Should I open it?
Whatever
Take a look, everybody
Are you scared?
That's a lot
Don't touch my fish
I.. I didn't
He's trying to act tough

[Stomach growls]
Wait! Why?
I didn't get to eat much I'm so hungry
Nothing in life is free
What will you do for me?
[Singing]
That's nuts
I did all that because I was hungry
What are you yapping about?
Does he think the world is his?
Look at you talking back
[Singing]
[KBS and Tzuyang would like to show support to overcome the crisis of Masu Salmon caused by Covid-19]
Hello everyone~
I am here at Hwachun today
This is where they hold the Masu Salmon festival

But as you can see, it's completely empty
The festival got cancelled because of the pandemic
That's why I am here to show them support
This is a little embarrassing, but This says "Masu Salmon Advertising Fairy"
I will do my best
[Although this is not a big help, I hope that it will still bring strength to the local economy]
[Preparing to do a live mukbang]
[Staging the camera]
[Ready for mukbang]
Please wear that hat
[Perfect]
Beautiful
Hello everyone
We are currently filming the show "Hometown Report"
Over here we have Mr. Baek who will be with me today
Hello all

Everyone knows him, right?
[Former Korean wrestler]
[Debuted as a trot singer in 2006]
What we have today for mukbang
are Masu Salmon dishes
Masu Salmon Sashimi,
Spicy Masu Salmon Stew,
and Grilled Masu Salmon
We have been told that the local fish farms are struggling because the festival got cancelled
We are here together to advertise a little about the Masu Salmon
That's right
You are so famous
Look at the chat
Let's hurry and review the food
Yes, let's hurry
We'll go ahead and start

Bon appetit! Just like that
Bon appetit
5 pieces
I will take 5
It's my first time trying Masu Salmon sashimi
It looks like it's been aged
Cheers
I'm speechless
It's not fishy at all
Maybe because it's so fresh
And I love the scent
5 pieces for Tzuyang is nothing
[Chat: That looks delicious] It is!
[So many viewers!]
[Delete that]
Do you see this?

This is the Spicy Masu Salmon Stew
Tzuyang's bowl first
How is it?
It's amazing
So good
The soup is delicious
It's so tasty
Try the meat
I'll try 5 pieces too
I'm curious about the Grilled Masu Salmon too
Think of it as galbi (Short ribs)
Just like this?
This.. is really amazing
We didn't get to eat anything for the whole day
That's why we're so hungry
[Chat: Where can we buy that fish?]

We are here at Hwacheon county in Gangwon-do province
Everything related to Masu Salmon including the festival have been cancelled due to Covid-19
So the local fish markets and farmers are struggling right now
I will try to advertise it a little
Yes, go ahead and show us
Yes, that!
We helped make the semi-dried masu salmon
These are packaged like this
This is packaged as semi-dry It's huge
I'm curious about this too I want to try it
It's canned Masu Salmon
Just like canned tuna!
This is really cool
This is for the grill
[Website to purchase]
They will deliver

The semi-dried and the canned They are so convenient
Order it and try it yourself
Can I try it right now?
Yes, please
I want to try it too
We all know about the canned tuna
I think we can just scoop it like this
It's very similar to the canned tuna
This has a very clean taste
It's good
And also some of the sashimi
How many are you getting at once?
There's no need for words
The grill was so good, so we'll make more
Please leave some for me too
Don't worry

Tzuyang knows how to eat
I really wanted to come see and experience the festival
That's right
I'm so sad that it's been canceled
All the fish have nowhere to go now
It's a sad case
[Chat: Who can eat more?]
Of course I can
[Chat: No way. Tzuyang wins]
They're all saying that I can
Hey, we're running out of time
We need to go very soon,
Since we're on the Hometown Report show
We can eat after the show
[Chat: What is that on your head?] It's Masu Salmon
It will be hideous if I wear it

Since Tzuyang wants me to..
You look good
[Chat: Tzuyang is lying!]
Who ate all of this?
Not me
You were eating a lot too
What is that?
Braised stew
The smell
Braised Masu Salmon Stew
Here you go Thank you
Take a piece like this
This is the real deal
Sadly, it's our time to say goodbye
I want to eat more
I'm planning on eating more after

It was fun to be on the show with you
Let's finish the rest after we end the show
Yes, when we end the stream
[I will head out first]
Show some love for Masu Salmon
Small economies change the world [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
